channel.title: Azure Monitor on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Monitor on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Protect sensitive generative AI telemetry in Application Insights and Microsoft Foundry
item.description:
Application Insights now stores generative AI content in a dedicated GenAIContent table (AppGenAIContent in Log Analytics), enabling access controls for sensitive AI telemetry. The update is in public preview.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Advanced platform metrics in Azure Monitor
item.description:
Azure Monitor now has advanced platform metrics in Public Preview starting July 15, 2026. The preview adds improved visibility into platform performance, resource health, and operational trends for supported Azure services.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Ingest OTLP signals into Azure Monitor with the OpenTelemetry Collector
item.description:
Azure Monitor now generally supports native ingestion of OTLP signals. OpenTelemetry-instrumented applications and platforms can send telemetry directly to Azure Monitor.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Monitor Service Level Indicators (SLI)
item.description:
Azure Monitor now supports Service Level Indicators (SLIs) and Service Level Objectives (SLOs) in general availability. The feature helps teams measure application experience using customer-facing metrics rather than only infrastructure signals.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Simple log alerts in Azure Monitor
item.description:
Azure Monitor’s Simple log alerts are now generally available. The feature adds a simplified way to create log-based alerts for monitoring and alerting.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: OpenTelemetry Metrics, Visualizations, and Enhanced Monitoring in Azure Monitor for Azure VMs and Arc Servers
item.description:
Azure Monitor for Azure VMs and Arc Servers now generally available with OpenTelemetry metrics and visualizations, providing a unified monitoring experience. The release consolidates key monitoring capabilities into a single experience.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Monitor HTTP traffic in Azure Container Apps
item.description:
Azure Container Apps now provides a dedicated Azure Monitor diagnostic setting category, ContainerAppHTTPLogs, for detailed HTTP access logs on incoming traffic. The new category is intended for high-volume request data alongside existing platform-level logs.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Application Insights Auto-instrumentation for Azure Kubernetes Service apps
item.description:
Azure Monitor Application Insights auto-instrumentation for Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) apps is now generally available. It lets you monitor applications without changing source code, using only a few configuration steps.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Monitor dashboards with Grafana in Public, Government (Fairfax) and China
item.description:
Azure Monitor dashboards with Grafana are now generally available in Azure Public, Government (Fairfax), and China. The feature brings Grafana-based dashboard creation, editing, and sharing into the Azure Portal.

  • Source: Azure Updates
